system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, this is Daiki Lee. I have a flight coming up from JFK on May 17, but I need to get home sooner because my cat is really sick. Is there any way I can change to an earlier nonstop flight? Also, I can only do the change if it costs less than $100. I don’t have my reservation number handy, but my user ID is daiki_lee_6144. Can you help me?
Error: 'AirlineTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'AirlineTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I am able to help you change your flight, but I need to access your reservation details first. It seems there was a technical issue retrieving your reservation information. 

Could you please confirm the destination city for your upcoming flight from JFK on May 17? This will help me locate your reservation and check for earlier nonstop flights.
Sure, my destination city is Los Angeles (LAX). Let me know if you need any other details to find my reservation.
Error: 'AirlineTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'AirlineTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'AirlineTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I am currently experiencing a technical issue retrieving your reservation details. Without your reservation number or access to your reservation, I am unable to proceed with the flight change request.

Would you be able to provide your reservation number, or would you like me to transfer you to a human agent for further assistance?

Oh, I’m sorry—I don’t have my reservation number with me right now. If it’s possible, could you please transfer me to a human agent? I really need to get this sorted out as soon as possible. Thank you for your help!

arguments.summary: User Daiki Lee needs to change an upcoming JFK-LAX flight to an earlier nonstop flight due to a pet emergency, but does not have the reservation number. User ID is daiki_lee_6144. Technical issues prevented reservation lookup.

messages.content: Error: 'AirlineTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I am unable to transfer you to a human agent due to a technical issue at the moment. I recommend contacting our customer service directly by phone or chat for urgent assistance. I apologize for the inconvenience and hope your cat feels better soon. If you obtain your reservation number or if the system is restored, I will be happy to assist you further.
Alright, I understand. Thanks for letting me know. I’ll try reaching out through phone or chat. I appreciate your help, and I hope I can get this sorted soon. Have a good day.

Thank you for your understanding, Daiki. I’m truly sorry I couldn’t resolve this for you directly. I hope your cat feels better soon and that your travel plans work out smoothly. If you need further assistance in the future, please don’t hesitate to reach out. Have a good day and safe travels!
Thank you for your kind words. I appreciate your help and understanding. I’ll reach out again if I need anything else. Have a great day!
You're very welcome, Daiki! If you need anything in the future, I'll be here to help. Wishing you and your cat all the best. Have a wonderful day!
Thank you so much. That means a lot. Take care!
You're very welcome, Daiki. Take care as well, and best wishes to you and your cat! If you need anything in the future, just let me know. Safe travels!
Thank you, I really appreciate it. Have a great day!
Thank you, Daiki! Wishing you a great day as well. If you need assistance in the future, I’m here to help. Take care!
